Sports Scene

Copied

Of the 19 gold medal events being contested on Monday at the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics, CGTN Sports Scene has selected the following competitions as recommendations for audience members around the world:

The men's skateboarding street final will get underway at the Place de la Concord at 17:00 (GMT+2).

Later in the day, the artistic gymnastics men's team final will take place at the Bercy Arena on 17:30 (GMT+2).

At 20:30 (GMT+2) in the swimming pool of the Olympic Aquatics Centre at the Paris La Defense Arena, the best-performing athletes will take home the women's 400-meter individual medley and men's 200-meter freestyle gold medals.

The men's foil individual title bout will take place at the Grand Palais at 22:10 (GTM+2).
